news.title: Coromandel International saw a BSE block trade worth Rs 202.9 cr for 1,013,276 shares at Rs 2002.05.
news.summary: Coromandel International saw a BSE block trade worth Rs 202.9 cr for 1,013,276 shares at Rs 2002.05.

news.title:
Coromandel International Ltd starts trial production at its PA and SA plants in Kakinada, aiming for full capacity by FY 2025-26.
Shares traded at Rs. 2023.05, down from Rs. 2067.45; intraday high Rs. 2090.00, low Rs. 1994.70; turnover Rs. 37.2M.
news.summary:
Coromandel International Ltd starts trial production at its PA and SA plants in Kakinada, aiming for full capacity by FY 2025-26.
Shares traded at Rs. 2023.05, down from Rs. 2067.45; intraday high Rs. 2090.00, low Rs. 1994.70; turnover Rs. 37.2M.

news.title: Coromandel International begins operations at new phosphoric, sulphuric acid plants in Kakinada.
news.summary: Coromandel International begins operations at new phosphoric, sulphuric acid plants in Kakinada.

news.title:
Strait of Hormuz disruption may impact fertiliser supply & prices, critical for imported urea, DAP, MOP.
Stocks like Coromandel, Deepak Fertilisers, Deepak Nitrite may face effects; govt support may cushion volatility.
news.summary:
Strait of Hormuz disruption may impact fertiliser supply & prices, critical for imported urea, DAP, MOP.
Stocks like Coromandel, Deepak Fertilisers, Deepak Nitrite may face effects; govt support may cushion volatility.

news.title:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.
news.summary:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.

news.title:
Coromandel International reports Q3 total income of INR 8,863 crores, up 26% YoY.
EBITDA rises 12% YoY to INR 805 crores; fertilizer output up 18% YoY to 9.9 lakh tons.
news.summary:
Coromandel International reports Q3 total income of INR 8,863 crores, up 26% YoY.
EBITDA rises 12% YoY to INR 805 crores; fertilizer output up 18% YoY to 9.9 lakh tons.

news.title:
Tagros Chemicals acquired Bayer AG's Flubendiamide business, including key brands.
Flubendiamide, an insecticide for rice and cotton pests, joins Tagros' new Arquivo entity.
news.summary:
Tagros Chemicals acquired Bayer AG's Flubendiamide business, including key brands.
Flubendiamide, an insecticide for rice and cotton pests, joins Tagros' new Arquivo entity.

news.title:
Coromandel Int'l proposes reclassifying Algavista Greentech from Promoter to NIL category.
Algavista Greentech holds no equity shares; approval sought from BSE and NSE.
news.summary:
Coromandel Int'l proposes reclassifying Algavista Greentech from Promoter to NIL category.
Algavista Greentech holds no equity shares; approval sought from BSE and NSE.

news.title:
Focus on domestic fertilizer production and deep tech to boost India's fertilizer sector.
Coromandel CEO highlights customs duty rationalisation, GST fixes for cost efficiency and cash flow improvement.
news.summary:
Focus on domestic fertilizer production and deep tech to boost India's fertilizer sector.
Coromandel CEO highlights customs duty rationalisation, GST fixes for cost efficiency and cash flow improvement.

news.title:
Coromandel Int'l reschedules Q3FY26 results conference call to Feb 2, 2026, at 2:30 PM IST.
Event hosted by IIFL Capital; audio recordings and transcripts will be on Coromandel's website.
news.summary:
Coromandel Int'l reschedules Q3FY26 results conference call to Feb 2, 2026, at 2:30 PM IST.
Event hosted by IIFL Capital; audio recordings and transcripts will be on Coromandel's website.

news.title:
Coromandel International's net profit declined 1.2% YoY despite a 26.6% revenue increase.
Margin compression and rising input costs pose challenges, requiring close operational monitoring.
news.summary:
Coromandel International's net profit declined 1.2% YoY despite a 26.6% revenue increase.
Margin compression and rising input costs pose challenges, requiring close operational monitoring.

news.title: Coromandel International approves a dividend of ₹9/share, rewarding shareholders.
news.summary: Coromandel International approves a dividend of ₹9/share, rewarding shareholders.

news.title: Coromandel International reports Q3 revenue of ₹87.79B, up from ₹69B YoY.
news.summary: Coromandel International reports Q3 revenue of ₹87.79B, up from ₹69B YoY.

news.title:
Coromandel International's subsidiary acquired 60% in SIPL for Rs.6 lakh.
The acquisition aims to enter the gypsum-based building materials sector with Sakarni.
news.summary:
Coromandel International's subsidiary acquired 60% in SIPL for Rs.6 lakh.
The acquisition aims to enter the gypsum-based building materials sector with Sakarni.

news.title:
Coromandel Intl. executed a Rs. 20.84 Cr NSE block trade for ~90,616 shares.
The trade was priced at Rs. 2300.1 per share.
news.summary:
Coromandel Intl. executed a Rs. 20.84 Cr NSE block trade for ~90,616 shares.
The trade was priced at Rs. 2300.1 per share.

news.title:
Coromandel International raised its stake in NACL Industries via rights issue.
It subscribed to 1.88 Cr shares at Rs 76.7, increasing stake to 53.73%.
news.summary:
Coromandel International raised its stake in NACL Industries via rights issue.
It subscribed to 1.88 Cr shares at Rs 76.7, increasing stake to 53.73%.

news.title:
Coromandel plans Rs 4,000-5,000 crore capex by FY25-28 to boost margins, earnings stability, and reduce raw material dependence.
Crop protection revenue is expected to double in 5 years, supported by new products, NACL integration, and exports.
news.summary:
Coromandel plans Rs 4,000-5,000 crore capex by FY25-28 to boost margins, earnings stability, and reduce raw material dependence.
Crop protection revenue is expected to double in 5 years, supported by new products, NACL integration, and exports.

news.title:
Coromandel International plans a USD 200,000 investment to set up a unit in the Philippines.
This move highlights its strategic expansion into Southeast Asia.
news.summary:
Coromandel International plans a USD 200,000 investment to set up a unit in the Philippines.
This move highlights its strategic expansion into Southeast Asia.

news.title:
Coromandel International uploaded investor presentation for Dec 1, 2025, on its website.
The update aligns with SEBI disclosure rules, aiding investors tracking company events.
news.summary:
Coromandel International uploaded investor presentation for Dec 1, 2025, on its website.
The update aligns with SEBI disclosure rules, aiding investors tracking company events.

news.title:
Coromandel International sees revised fundamentals, impacting ROE, ROCE, debt, and operational consistency.
The evaluation highlights financial metric shifts with implications for investors and market observers.
news.summary:
